name: Temporary Inbound Exclusion
description: A basic scenario where client 0 disagrees with client 1, but only for rounds 1-2. After round 2, the disagreement expires and all clients use the global track.

expected_tracks.global: Global track (for clients 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 without specific disagreements)

expected_tracks_round_3.global: Global track (for all clients after disagreement expires)

round_1_rules.description: Clients 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 should be on the global track

round_2_rules.description: Clients 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 should be on the global track

round_3_rules.description: All clients should be on the global track after disagreement expires
